The '''''Clavier''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] belonging to the [[Pakuuni Pirates]]. She was defending a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] outpost along with ''[[Leach]]'' and ''[[Grapler]]''. ''Clavier'' was destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] along with the other [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] and the entire outpost.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
